name: harness
description: Lean modular harness for Claude Code — feedforward + feedback sensors that improve code output. Inspired by martinfowler.com/articles/harness-engineering.html.

plugins.name: harness
plugins.description: Three hooks (UserPromptSubmit, PostToolUse, Stop) plus on-demand /review-diff. Per-language lint+typecheck, project test runner, secret scan, architecture fitness scaffolding, and a vendoring skill so the harness travels with your repo.
